caption:
OpenAI has partnered with Broadcom to unveil the 'Jalapeño' chip, designed specifically for large language model inference. This custom chip is expected to run at gigawatt scale by late 2026. The collaboration signifies OpenAI's first major step into custom hardware production. 🔍🚀  

What are your thoughts on custom AI hardware?  

Sources: The Decoder, OpenAI  

#OpenAI #Broadcom #AI #TechNews #ChipDesign #Jalapeno #Innovation #Semiconductors #MachineLearning #LargeLanguageModels #CustomHardware

📷 Cover photo: 首相官邸ホームページ · CC BY 4.0

slides.headline: OPENAI AND BROADCOM JUST UNVEILED A CUSTOM CHIP FOR LLM INFERENCE
slides.sub: Here's the breakthrough in AI hardware.
slides.image_prompt: A modern high-tech laboratory, featuring engineers discussing chip designs. The atmosphere is dynamic, with advanced equipment visible in the background.

slides.headline: THE 'JALAPEÑO' CHIP IS BUILT FROM SCRATCH FOR OPTIMIZED PERFORMANCE
slides.sub: This chip focuses exclusively on large language model tasks.
slides.image_prompt: Close-up of a sleek semiconductor chip on a clean workspace, surrounded by engineering tools and components.

slides.headline: FIRST DEPLOYMENT OF 'JALAPEÑO' SCHEDULED FOR LATE 2026 AT GIGAWATT SCALE
slides.sub: Broadcom and OpenAI plan to deliver substantial power for AI workloads.
slides.image_prompt: An industrial facility with large-scale energy infrastructure, depicting power generation and advanced cooling systems.

slides.headline: OPENAI CLAIMS THE FASTEST ASIC DEVELOPMENT CYCLE IN THE INDUSTRY
slides.sub: The design-to-tape-out process took just nine months.
slides.image_prompt: A group of engineers in a brainstorming session, surrounded by digital screens showing chip designs and data analysis.

slides.headline: OPENAI IS TAKING CONTROL OF ITS HARDWARE STACK FOR BETTER PERFORMANCE
slides.sub: This move could significantly reduce costs and increase efficiency.
slides.image_prompt: A futuristic command center with monitors displaying AI model performance metrics and chip architecture.

story.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil "Jalapeño," a custom chip built for LLM inference
